hero.title: The tools you need, unpaywalled.
hero.subtitle: Neetpix gives you premium office & media tools — for free. No subscriptions. No paywalls.
hero.privacyDesc: By default, all processing happens directly in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

removeBackground.title: Remove Background
removeBackground.description: Upload an image and remove its background instantly. Powered by AI, processed entirely in your browser.
removeBackground.upload: Drop an image here or click to browse
removeBackground.uploadHint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP — up to 20MB
removeBackground.privacy: 🔒 100% private — your image never leaves your device
removeBackground.watermark: Free version includes watermark. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited downloads.
removeBackground.errorFormat: Please upload a valid image file.
removeBackground.errorProcessing: Failed to process the image. Please try again.
removeBackground.errorLoad: Failed to load the image. Please try another file.

imageToPdf.title: Image to PDF
imageToPdf.description: Upload multiple images and combine them into a single PDF file. Processed entirely in your browser.
imageToPdf.upload: Drop images here or click to browse
imageToPdf.uploadHint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP — up to 20MB each
imageToPdf.privacy: 🔒 100% private — your images never leave your device
imageToPdf.errorFormat: Please upload a valid image file (JPG, PNG, or WebP).

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents. Text is extracted locally in your browser.
pdfToWord.upload: Drop a PDF file here or click to browse
pdfToWord.privacy: 🔒 100% private — your file never leaves your device
pdfToWord.qualityNote: Note: This tool extracts text content. Complex layouts, images, and tables may not be preserved.
pdfToWord.errorParse: Failed to parse PDF. The file may be corrupted or encrypted.

screenshotTranslate.title: Screenshot Translate
screenshotTranslate.description: Extract text from screenshots and translate it instantly. OCR runs locally in your browser.
screenshotTranslate.upload: Drop a screenshot here or click to browse
screenshotTranslate.uploadHint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP — up to 20MB
screenshotTranslate.pasteHint: You can also paste (Ctrl+V) a screenshot
screenshotTranslate.privacy: 🔒 OCR runs locally. Translation goes through our API proxy and is not stored.
screenshotTranslate.emptyOcr: No text was recognized in the image. Please try a clearer screenshot.
screenshotTranslate.errorFormat: Please upload a valid image file.
screenshotTranslate.errorOcr: OCR recognition failed. Please try another image.

imageCompress.title: Image Compress
imageCompress.description: Compress images to reduce file size without losing quality. Processed entirely in your browser.
imageCompress.upload: Drop images here or click to browse
imageCompress.uploadHint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP — up to 20MB each
imageCompress.privacy: 🔒 100% private — your images never leave your device
imageCompress.errorFormat: Please upload a valid image file.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Neetpix is committed to protecting your privacy. Most of our tools process your files entirely in your browser — your data never touches our servers.
privacy.localProcessingDesc: The following tools process all data entirely in your browser. Files you upload are never sent to any server:
privacy.localProcessingTools: Remove Background, Image to PDF, PDF to Word, Image Compress
privacy.apiProcessingDesc: The Screenshot Translate tool runs OCR locally in your browser, but sends the recognized text to our translation API proxy for translation. The text is not stored on our servers and is discarded immediately after translation.
privacy.dataRetentionDesc: We do not store your files or translated text. All processing is ephemeral. We only collect anonymous usage analytics (page views, tool usage counts) via Vercel Analytics, which does not use cookies or track individual users.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We use the following third-party services: Vercel (hosting and analytics), MyMemory Translation API (for screenshot translation). These services have their own privacy policies.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@neetpix.com

faq.title: FAQ
faq.removeBackground1a: Yes, completely free. AI runs in your browser, so we have no server costs.
faq.removeBackground2a: JPG, PNG, and WebP up to 20MB.
faq.removeBackground3: Does the free version have a watermark?
faq.removeBackground3a: Yes, the free version includes a small Neetpix watermark. Future Pro version will offer watermark-free downloads.
faq.imageToPdf1: Can I reorder images after uploading?
faq.imageToPdf1a: Yes, drag and drop any thumbnail to reorder.
faq.imageToPdf2a: A4, Letter, or fit to original image size. Portrait or landscape orientation.
faq.imageToPdf3: Is there a limit on the number of images?
faq.imageToPdf3a: No hard limit, but we recommend under 50 images for best performance.
faq.pdfToWord1: Does PDF to Word preserve formatting?
faq.pdfToWord1a: This tool extracts text content. Complex layouts, images, and tables may not be fully preserved.
faq.pdfToWord2a: 50MB. Processing happens in your browser, so very large files may be slow.
faq.pdfToWord3a: Scanned PDFs without a text layer cannot be extracted. The tool requires selectable text in the PDF.
faq.screenshotTranslate1a: English and Chinese, in both directions (EN→ZH and ZH→EN), plus auto-detect.
faq.screenshotTranslate2: Can I paste a screenshot directly?
faq.screenshotTranslate2a: Yes, press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V on Mac) to paste a screenshot from your clipboard.
faq.screenshotTranslate3a: OCR accuracy depends on image clarity. Translation uses the MyMemory API. For best results, use clear, high-contrast screenshots.
faq.imageCompress1a: You control the quality level (1-100%). Lower quality means smaller file size but more visible compression artifacts.
faq.imageCompress2: Can I convert formats during compression?
faq.imageCompress2a: Yes, you can output as JPG, PNG, or WebP regardless of the original format.
faq.imageCompress3: Is there a batch download option?
faq.imageCompress3a: Yes, upload multiple images and click Download All to get a ZIP file.

error.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
error.boundaryDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
